docs.title: Sylvis Filament Wiki
docs.text: Welcome to the official documentation for the Sylvis Filament Datapack. This wiki provides technical details, item specifications, and installation guides.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
To ensure the datapack functions correctly, follow these steps:

  1. Datapack Installation: Place the datapack folder/zip into the /datapacks folder of your world save.
  2. Resource Pack: Ensure the Filament-generated resource pack is active. Without it, custom items will not display their unique textures.

docs.title: Features
docs.text: This datapack utilizes the Filament framework to add: * Custom Equipment: Weapons and tools with modified attributes. * Functional Items: Items with unique triggers and behaviors. * Optimized Performance: Lightweight implementation for server environments.

docs.title: Documentation Categories
docs.text:
Use the links below or the sidebar to navigate through the content:

  • Weapons – Statistics and abilities for combat items.
  • Tools – Information regarding utility and mining equipment.
  • Technical Info – Commands, permissions, and internal IDs.

Note: For administrative testing, use the command /give @s filament:<item_id> to obtain specific items manually.
